title: DocumentNode
description: A validated leaf implementation node in the ledger document tree. Schema version 1. The schemaVersion field (const: 1) inside the schema carries the version for validators that need it programmatically.

schemaVersion.description: Injected by the validator; documents do not write this field in markdown.

nodeId.description: Absolute node ID derived from file path.

parentId.description: Absolute node ID of this node's parent, or null for the root node.

status.description: Normalized lifecycle status (uppercase, hyphens replaced with underscores). DEFERRED is a terminal status (PRD §6.2) for nodes explicitly removed from the active roadmap.

statusAnnotation.description: Optional parenthetical annotation from the **Status:** line, e.g. 'v1, 2026-05-23'.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 date from **Last Updated:** front-matter line; trailing parenthetical dropped.

dependencies.description: Backtick-delimited IDs from **Dependencies:** front-matter line. Empty for '—' or absent.

sections.description: Map of section heading → raw markdown body. additionalProperties allows dated audit sections.

relId.description: Relative child ID as written in the manifest table.

title.description: Child title from the manifest table.

dependsOn.description: Relative sibling IDs this child depends on.

children.description: Parsed manifest rows from the ## Children section. Empty array for leaf docs with 'None.'
